vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: During my formative years, I remember road trips being the highlight of our summer vacations.
As a child, I had boundless curiosity, constantly pressing my face against the window to observe the changing landscapes.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: Car journeys provided a wonderful sense of escapism, making me feel like I was embarking on a grand adventure.
To be honest, my enjoyment was often dampened by a tendency to suffer from motion sickness on winding roads.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My father always insisted on taking the scenic route, which allowed us to discover hidden gems in the countryside.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng lại một cách sống động
vocab.example: I can vividly recollect the rhythmic sound of the engine, which often lulled me into a peaceful nap.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết gia đình chất lượng
vocab.example: Long drives were a prime opportunity for quality family bonding, filled with sing-alongs and word games.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc cãi vã ở ghế sau (thường giữa anh chị em)
vocab.example: Although I loved the trips, they weren't without occasional back-seat squabbles with my brother over personal space.
I was fascinated by the fleeting glimpses of wildlife and quaint villages as we zoomed past on the highway.
I loved watching the world unfold before my eyes through the car window, feeling a deep sense of wonder.
